ogTitle: Woody Head vs Woolgarlo: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Woody Head and Woolgarlo.
heading: Woody Head vs Woolgarlo — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Woody Head, New South Wales and Woolgarlo, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Woody Head has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Woolgarlo (32/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Woody Head or Woolgarlo safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Woody Head has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Woolgarlo scores 47/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Woody Head scores 30/100 for bushfire risk. Woolgarlo scores 31/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Woody Head or Woolgarlo?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Woody Head has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.3% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
